purpose: Structural snapshot of the canonical _TEMPLATE page in the UDS Components Figma file. Drives scripts/audit-figma-card-template.sh, which fails CI if .cursor/skills/figma-component-card/references/build-card.js stops emitting these values. The template page is a designer-authored visual reference (NOT a runtime input to the builder); this snapshot is how we keep the recipe and the reference honest with each other.
refresh: When designers update the _TEMPLATE page, run a fresh figma-component-card pre-flight read of node 7481:14 and update this snapshot. Then update the matching values in build-card.js so the audit passes again.

secHead.title: States
secHead.description: Interaction states for the primary medium variant. Each state has its own visual treatment to communicate affordance.

secHead.title: Variant matrix
secHead.description: Each variant shows the full state matrix — destructive on/off, sizes, icon options, and interaction states.

stage.sizingNotes: Stage widths are computed at build time as floor((2544 - 32 * (n - 1)) / n) for n stages — even-split across the inner card width minus gaps. The template's three placeholder stages of 827px each match this formula for n=3.

secHead.title: Component groups
secHead.description: Sub-component sets that compose with the primary set — like button groups or input add-ons. Reparented in as their own stages.

secHead.title: When to use, when not to
Keyboard & screen reader
secHead.description: How keyboard users and assistive technology interact with this component.

knownDeferredFromBuilder.drift: Auto-discovery of state variants when primary is a single COMPONENT (not COMPONENT_SET) — see references/card-rollout-drift-report.md drift #11. The button page lost ANATOMY and SUB-COMPONENTS sections because its primary is a top-level INSTANCE, not a COMPONENT_SET. Builder needs to handle COMPONENT-typed primaries.
knownDeferredFromBuilder.deferredReason: Behavior change requires careful validation before the next rollout; current PR scope is layout-recipe corrections only.
knownDeferredFromBuilder.trackedIn: follow-up PR — figma-component-card builder: handle non-COMPONENT_SET primaries

knownDeferredFromBuilder.drift: Stragglers logic preserves duplicate INSTANCEs of primary sets — see references/card-rollout-drift-report.md drift #12. Badge page has a stranded udc-badge INSTANCE at y=3480.
knownDeferredFromBuilder.deferredReason: Removing duplicates is destructive; needs a designer-confirmed policy first.
knownDeferredFromBuilder.trackedIn: follow-up PR — figma-component-card builder: dedupe primary INSTANCEs
